raw_input:
[4.0/5] The scent was strong. I’m not a huge fan of face masks. It’s messy and takes too much time. As a mother of three kids, I don’t have a lot of time for myself. The exfoliating scrub and hydrating mask's selling point for me was you only need to keep it on for 2 minutes. I use it during my bath time making it convenient and easy to wash off.

The mask is nice and cooling. It was easy to apply during my bath and rinsing off was easy peasy. The scent was meh! Not a fan of the strong smell. My face felt smooth, soft, and hydrated after application. [4.0/5] Fine quality I am a senior, and my skin is oily - a combination which makes it quite difficult to find masks and exfoliants. Though this product is extremely expensive, it did give my skin a silky texture. I did not find that it had any effect on removing blackheads. I believe it is a perfect gift, albeit very pricey, for us older ladies, but more for those looking to have a youthful smoothness to skin than those who have perpetual oily plugs. [4.0/5] Smells wonderful and feels great! I'll start by saying this exfoliating scrub and mask smells wonderful. It's made of natural ingredients and has a natural smell to it which I love! The exfoliating aspect of this mask is great and leaves my skin feeling extremely smooth. Definitely can tell it is removing dead skin cells. It is extremely hydrating but does leave a bit of oily feeling on the skin after rinsing off. I personally will use it 1-2 times a week because of this reason. I was surprised to see the jar is larger than how much cream you actually get. [4.0/5] Lovely I like this little mask a lot. Definitely exfoliates so I use it rarely, but it gives great results. [4.0/5] Works well but gritty texture This scrub works well as a gentle exfoliant. It leaves my skin feeling soft and not too dry. However I’m not a fan of the large chunks of rice in it. I was expecting a smoother scrub texture, but it feels grainy and scratchy and not very delicate.

I’ve read that large grains of natural martial in an exfoliant can subtly scratch the skin due to their uneven texture, so I worry about that with this.

It also has a stronger scent than I was expecting. It’s not too overpowering but I was expecting something milder based on the product description.

Overall this works well, but note that it’s definitely a very scrubby texture. I am also unsure about the value for the price. The packaging has some awkward sentences and the ink on the jar isn’t perfect. Tiny little things like that keep it from feeling truly luxurious. [5.0/5] Feels so soothing & moisturizing I’ve been using this for nearly 2 weeks now and I’ve started to get comments on how much brighter and soft my face looks! This cream is very easy on sensitive skin, like myself. The texture is creamy but with the occasional rice bits, it’s still simple to apply. The scent is pleasant, but subtle and doesn’t linger which I like! I love how it comes with a little spoon, makes it easier & less messy to apply to your face. The whole process of putting this on and then washing it off, makes my face feel like I just got a professional facial done at a spa! The scrub leaves my skin feeling so moisturized and refreshed. Very please with the scrub! [5.0/5] Absolutely amazing mask!! A lot of products boast their benefits and this one delivers! It is a great cleaners and exfoliator. It is a terrific balance of both, the scent is not overwhelming, I actually really like it, and your face feels soft and replenished afterward! Great ingredients, very gentle mask, leaves sling nice fresh moisturized! I highly recommend it!! [5.0/5] Coco’s Conclusion: Natural Ingredients, Vegan, No Animal Testing This product comes in a paste. It has dual qualities as it is an exfoliating scrub and facemask. You can use it for any skin, whether that be oily, combo or normal. It has natural active ingredients, which is my favorite part. It goes on like a paste and has a great scent. I felt like my skin was very hydrated and glowed after use. There are only about 2 1/2 ounces of product in the container, which makes this fairly pricey, but sometimes that is the case with skincare products that work. [5.0/5] Leaves Your Skin Feeling Wonderful My only issue with this product is that the packaging is deceiving. The way the jar is made was definitely intentional to cut down on the product you receive. So a more accurate amount for the size of the jar would be great. I have used this for 11 days and my face has never felt or looked better. Even my husband noticed and he never notices anything. It is a paste consistency with little beads to help exfoliate. I covered my whole face, left on for 2 minutes and it easily washed off with warm water. My skin felt amazing afterwards and not tight or sticky like other products I have used before. All in all, I am happy with this product. Just fix the jar issue that gives you less than you are expecting of product and this stuff would be great. [4.0/5] Lovely scent, but probably not for sensitive skin I don't have sensitive skin, but after my first use, I noticed that my face was red from rubbing in the exfoliation. It didn't take long for the redness to go away, so I gave it another try, but this time, I massaged the mask on very gently, and I mostly left it on for a couple minutes in the shower before rinsing it off. My skin felt moisturized, and it felt a little oily, but not in a bad way. I personally prefer masks that hydrate without the oily feeling, but this one was quite nice, especially during this dry winter weather. Another thing I really loved is the lavender/rose petal smell. The floral note isn't pungent, but it's definitely strong, which might not be a good fit for those who don't like floral scents. The mask is thick, and it spreads evenly without melting in the shower or being so cakey that it's hard to wash off. This is definitely a high quality mask, in my opinion, but I just wish the exfoliation had gentler beads. [2.0/5] Ingredients on packaging not listed on sellings description. I ordered this based on the sellers listing of ingredients, unfortunately what I received was different and it has ingredients that I am allergic to, so I can not properly review this product. The smell is nice, and the jar is a thick plastic. The box had a lot of fading and didn't match the expensive price tag for the item. I'm sorry I can't review the actual product. [2.0/5] Ingredients on packaging not listed on sellings description. I ordered this based on the sellers listing of ingredients, unfortunately what I received was different and it has ingredients that I am allergic to, so I can not properly review this product. The smell is nice, and the jar is a thick plastic. The box had a lot of fading and didn't match the expensive price tag for the item. I'm sorry I can't review the actual product. [5.0/5] Amazing Mask I was very pleased with this Dewy Glowy Scrub/Mask. You simply apply the scrub to your face, rubbing it in gently. Then you can leave it on for anywhere between 2 minutes and an hour depending on how long you want. I typically use it for 20-30 minutes but sometimes will do just a quick session. Even after a few minutes, it really made my skin feel amazing. It has proven, pure ingredients and did not irritate my skin at all. Unlike many scrubs, this isn't drying at all - in fact, it is very moisturizing. [5.0/5] Review of scrub cream [[VIDEOID:2cd31f84a2d632c0579bc282c5b8acd9]] After reading pure Australian rice on the ingredient list, I had a high expectation about this cream because my mother and aunt used to tell me about the benefits of rice water on the skin. I am 68 years old with dark patches on my cheek, forehead, and eye areas. After using the cream for two days, I can say it exceeded my expectations. I like how it felt so smooth on my skin, and many dead skin cells were pushed out between my fingers without any irritation. The benefits to my skin are astounding as it feels amazingly soft and brighter. I am so happy to have found this product. I would recommend it to many of my friends. [5.0/5] Amazing! This product is pretty amazing! It was very creamy with a lovely scent. I first applied the cream and massaged all over my face and left it for 2 minutes following the instruction. Washing it off was pretty easy too. The whole 2-minute experience made me feel like I had a complete facial at home with the scrub and mask. Afterwards my skin felt so smooth, refreshing and moist, it almost did not need for me to apply lotion after. This scrub cream gives the most moistness. Very satisfied. [5.0/5] Amazing!!!! I used this dewy glowy facial scrub only 10days and my husband and friends see the difference in my face getting brighter and shiny. I used it as directed,left for 2min and washed gently with warm water, what a soft feeing!!!
I confidently and proudly recommended this scrub to all my friends and neighbors I can tell
All La Maxime products will make a difference compared to other cosmetics [5.0/5] made w. natural ingredients.... for better skin

response:
Product scrub mask get many good reviews. Most say skin feel soft, smooth, hydrated after use. Many like natural ingredients, pleasant scent - some say lavender rose smell strong, not for all. Easy apply, wash off, good for bath time. Leave on 2 minutes, work good. Rice bead texture help exfoliate - some say too gritty, scratchy for delicate skin. Most say skin look brighter, glowy after use. Some notice results in days, others weeks. Good for dry skin, winter weather. Some say oily feeling after, not bad way.

Bad: Price high for small jar. Two buyers angry - ingredients on label not match what inside, cause allergy concern, big problem. Packaging look cheap for price. Jar design trick eye, look bigger than product inside.

Overall most buyers happy, recommend to friends, say feel like spa facial at home.
